Together, 
We Transform Human Experiences
For a Better World.
We place user experience at the heart
of everything we do.
We build transformative digital
experiences powered by ServiceNow.

UX4MATION is a leading international
ServiceNow Pure-play Partner

We deliver leading-edge strategy, digital transformation and advanced technology consulting and implementation services. Through collaboration and innovation, we help organizations transform workflows into seamless and memorable user journeys.

Discover more
 

Our ServiceNow Center of Excellence and Innovation (CoEI) capability offers leading-edge 

consulting and implementation services.

Combined with an industrial, cost-efficient delivery model, we deliver exceptional outcomes, 

grounded in 4 core pillars:

  • Customer Experience
  • Employee Experience
  • Technology Excellence
  • Operational Excellence

Our Design Thinking approach coupled with our iterative UX Design prototyping is at the core of every project.

ServiceNow Center of Excellence & Innovation (CoEI)

We provide end-to-end industrial delivery model on the ServiceNow platform including business relationship management, marketing and communication, innovation, transformation and RUN support services.

Discover more

Technology Excellence

We transform digital operations into a world-class adaptive technology. We help organizations optimize their existing technology to deliver always-on, responsive experiences.

Discover more

Employee Experience

We build seamless employee experience proactively managing “Moments that matter” for your people. Explore how you can reimagine your workplace!

Discover more

Customer Experience

We are in the economy era where customer experience is the main business differentiator. We orchestrate and automate work across existing processes and technology. We help you lower costs while improving CX.

Discover more

Operational Excellence

We help organisations work better and seamlessly embed risk management and compliance into digital experiences and workflows.

Discover more

We love our people.

Join our Great Place To Work!

Company Culture

We encourage our people to create a balanced life aligning their personal, professional, emotional, and physical well-being.

With an open and inclusive workplace, we empower people to drive innovation and deliver excellence to our customers. 

At UX4MATION, we transform experiences and create moments that matter.

Discover more

Engage with our people !

We believe in our talents.

At UX4MATION, diversity is not a box to check, it's in our DNA. We foster an open and inclusive workplace. Our Great Place To Work (GPTW) certification is a testimonial to our employee well-being.

Our team spans across the globe. We value a multicultural workplace that allows us to elevate human experiences.

We believe that our diverse culture fuels our journey.

  • Connect with us on LinkedIn
 

SALMA ANDOH

HEAD OF CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE

“The human experience above all. Beyond our areas of expertise, we actively contribute to the company's growth, engage in its day-to-day life, and have a say in its overall strategy. You might have a technical role but still be involved in shaping the Marketing or HR strategy... This level of involvement is quite rare in the professional world.”

 

Mohamed JAMH

ServiceNow TECHNICAL CONSULTANT

“At UX4MATION, I truly value the emphasis our team places on open and effective communication. Regardless of the topic, we always receive the information we need precisely when it’s required. This culture of transparency extends to our professional development, where our team is consistently engaged, seeking our feedback at every stage of our career growth. Team building is a core value at UX4MATION, creating a strong sense of collaboration and unity among colleagues. Additionally, we are kept well-informed about the company’s progress on various objectives, ensuring we feel connected to the broader mission, even when certain goals may not directly relate to our immediate responsibilities."

 

Lamia Bourich

ServiceNow TECHNICAL CONSULTANT

“From the first day I met UX4MATION, I knew from their presence and energy that this was the place where I would innovate and grow. I've experienced a work culture that truly embraces agility and flexibility. I love how quickly we can adapt to new challenges and how everyone’s input is not just welcomed but essential. Being part of a team where productivity, idea-sharing, charity work, continuous learning, training, and even gaming together are all integral parts of our daily routine is just incredible. We’re not just colleagues, we’re becoming more connected and more like family every day!” 

 

Oussama Haddi

ServiceNow TECHNICAL CONSULTANT

"Working at UX4MATION means being part of a team where every idea is valued, and every contribution makes a difference. The company places a strong emphasis on both personal and professional growth, offering constant opportunities to learn and improve. We are encouraged to take on challenging projects that have a real impact and to collaborate in an innovative environment. The work atmosphere is dynamic and inclusive, fostering a strong sense of teamwork where everyone is motivated to bring their best. At UX4MATION, we don't just follow trends, we set them, and every team member plays a crucial role in our collective success."

 

AYMAN LHEND

ServiceNow TECH LEAD

“Working at UX4MATION as a ServiceNow consultant means being part of an environment where innovation and collaboration drive every single project. Our company not only offers exciting projects that challenge your soft & hard skills, but also provides very strong support for professional and personal ambitions. Each team member is positively pushed to voice their ideas and contribute to the company’s strategic direction. UX4MATION also has one of the best flexible management frameworks accompanied with a strong focus on continuous learning, you grow alongside your co-workers while making a real impact on the world, by delivering the best solutions to our clients. Here, you're part of a big team that creates meaningful solutions every day.”

 

Loan Marcin

HEAD OF OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE

“A disruptive company. People are at the heart of every discussion. Our entire approach is centered on user experience (both clients and employees), starting with our own experience within the organization. From day one, there's a genuine sense of trust, sharing, and transparency.”

 

THOMAS LANGLADE

HEAD OF TECHNOLOGY EXCELLENCE 

“A village (a family) of proven ServiceNow experts who have made their mark in the market, working in a cohesive and complementary manner. We collaborate on the overall vision of the company, going beyond just client projects.”

 

Rabie Ouallaf

ServiceNow TECHNICAL CONSULTANT

" Working at UX4MATION means being part of a team where every talent is recognized and valued. From day one, I felt the significance of my ideas and their impact on the company's direction and growth. The work environment is both flexible and collaborative, allowing me to take on exciting challenges while continuously developing my skills. Here, we believe that every individual contribution is essential in building a shared future, where excellence and innovation drive every project."

 

Ghita Laraqui

HEAD OF MARKETING & COMMUNICATION

"At UX4MATION, we cultivate an environment that prioritizes personal development and the growth of soft skills. Every team member's voice is heard, and we ensure the right conditions are in place for each person to thrive. We’re committed to creating a space where individuals can experience both professional and personal fulfillment, while living truly unique professional and human experiences."

 

Jade Sayah

HEAD OF EMPLOYEE EXPERIENCE

"As a leader at UX4MATION, I’m proud to be part of an organization that truly values work-life balance and trust. We believe in empowering our team by giving them the autonomy to manage their time and responsibilities, fostering an agile and modern work culture that prioritizes both individual ownership and collective decision-making."

Use Cases

 

Discover how we can help organizations
through our consulting and implementation
services on the ServiceNow platform.

Insurance

Discover how our ServiceNow experts transform the insurance industry by delivering leading innovative solutions.

Discover more

Banking

Discover how our expert team transforms the banking industry by leveraging first-class ServiceNow solutions.

Discover more

Transportation & Logistics

Discover more

Utilities

Discover how our expert team transforms the utilities sector by leveraging outstanding ServiceNow solutions.

/what they say/

CLIENT STORIES

Our client's satisfaction is our first priority

Transportation & Logistics

We consider customer experience & technical expertise on the ServiceNow platform as strategic pillars to support our ambition in Enterprise Service Management (ESM). Thanks to UX4MATION, we benefit from an exceptional level of commitment and expertise, ensuring the quality and success of our transformation projects.

R.A.
 

ServiceNow Platform Owner

 

Insurance

We successfully implemented the ServiceNow Center Of Excellence and Innovation (CoEI) to industrialize our delivery model on the ServiceNow platform. UX4MATION provided expert services to digitize our finance and accounting processes as well as our IT4IT framework.

S.A.
 

Finance and Accounting Director

 

Banking

UX4MATION team helped us streamline our corporate business card services on the ServiceNow platform. We leveraged finance services operations to digitize end-to-end customer relationship.

D.L.
 

ServiceNow Business Platform Owner

 

Utilities

We were delighted to work with UX4MATION team helping us define our target operative model on finance procurement and ESG. We had the opportunity to shape and validate in less than 8 weeks our IT strategic plan.

B.T.
 

CIO Finance Procurement & ESG

 

Get the future you want !

ServiceNow enthousiasts, digital addicts or future developers, join our dream team.

Participate to large-scale projects and shape the future you want.

 

Discover our job opportunities to grow your career on the ServiceNow platform while creating positive social and economic impact. 

Job opportunities

Are you an experienced ServiceNow professional with over 4 years in the field? We invite you to apply and embark on a recruitment journey that prioritizes transparency, authenticity, and trust.  
 

At  UX4MATION, we’re eager to learn about the person behind the skills. We believe that bringing your true self to the table is key to finding the right fit. Join us and be part of a team that values your unique experiences and perspectives. We can’t wait to meet you!

SEND US YOUR RESUME
